mission.title: atlantis: feat: auto-plan projects when modules change
mission.description:
Fixes #920

See [testdata](https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/2507/files#diff-f2a614e806f20051c955922d44c5602829e844794bfcd938e5d91d35cdfae172) for an example repo structure. Any project that uses modules in the same repo should be able to take advantage. 

Only files that are not considered part of a project will be considered. With the current auto-plan heuristic, only changed files in `/modules/` without a `main.tf` would trigger a check of the modules dependencies. 

Adds `--autoplan-modules` and `--autoplan-modules-from-projects`

resolution.summary: @iamnoah please merge from the default branch to fix the `branch` test failure
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
